mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, table_name, column_name, rule_type, applicable_roles, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM sys.desensitize_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY table_name, column_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys.desensitize_rule (tenant_id, table_name, column_name, rule_type, applicable_roles, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{tableName}, #{columnName}, #{ruleType}, #{applicableRoles}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys.desensitize_rule SET tenant_id = #{tenantId}, table_name = #{tableName}, column_name = #{columnName}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, applicable_roles = #{applicableRoles}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
